channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Darius Garland scores 25, Cavaliers become 4th team to start 15-0 with 128-114 win over Hornets
item.description: Darius Garland scored 25 points, Ty Jerome matched his career-high with 24 in place of Donovan Mitchell and the Cleveland Cavaliers stayed unbeaten with a 128-114 win over the Charlotte Hornets.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NBA fines Bucks coach Doc Rivers for comments about call refs admitted they got wrong
item.description: Milwaukee coach Doc Rivers was fined $25,000 by the NBA on Sunday for public criticism of the officiating on a foul against Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo that the referees admitted they got wrong.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Packers block game-winning field goal to beat Bears, pick up 11th straight victory over rival
item.description: The Green Bay Packers blocked a game-winning field goal attempt by the Chicago Bears to defeat their NFC North rival, 20-19, in a thrilling battle at Soldier Field.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 1 Oregon rallies in 4th quarter to beat Wisconsin 16-13
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Oregon was trailing by seven points as Wisconsin fans were jumping around to open the fourth quarter. The top-ranked Ducks didn’t flinch.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LSU coach Brian Kelly screams at one player and gets yelled at by another in loss at Florida
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — LSU coach Brian Kelly was caught on camera screaming at one player and getting yelled at by another. The sideline scenes were clear signs of frustration for a program that was on its way to losing a third consecutive game, 27-16 at unranked Florida on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: NYU women's basketball team holds national title ceremony
item.description: GREENWICH VILLAGE, Manhattan (PIX11) — The NYU women’s basketball team kicked off their home game Friday night with a ring ceremony honoring last season’s historic, undefeated run that earned them the national championship.
item.dc:creator: Zhané Caldwell, PIX 11

item.title: Where to watch Mike Tyson-Jake Paul fight in Bay Area: Bars showing heavyweight bout
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight world champion Mike Tyson is fighting YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul in a professional boxing match on Friday at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lone Peak holds off Skyridge in 6A semifinal, 28-21
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Lone Peak Knights avenged a loss earlier in the season to Skyridge, and are headed back to the 6A championship game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will play their 2025 home games at the New York Yankees' nearby spring training ballpark amid uncertainty about the future of hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field, Rays executives told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Klay Thompson returns to cheers from some 400 Warriors employees
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Klay Thompson exited the team bus then beamed as he strolled back into Chase Center on Tuesday night, greeted by some 400 cheering Warriors employees who lined up along his path to the Dallas locker room to show their love and appreciation for the former Golden State star.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Chicago Sky introduce new head coach Tyler Marsh
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — A little more than a month after former head coach Teresa Weatherspoon was unceremoniously relieved of her duties, the Chicago Sky introduced their new head coach to the Windy City Tuesday. Tyler Marsh, who was hired on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Interim Oakland Roots head coach gets promoted
item.description: (KRON) – Oakland Roots Soccer Club Interim Head Coach Gavin Glinton can finally ditch the “interim” of his title. The soccer club announced that Glinton has been promoted to full-time Head Coach ahead of the 2025 United Soccer League Championship season.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Dodgers fan claims he was fired for calling in sick, attending World Series parade
item.description: People are willing to go to great lengths to support their beloved sports teams—one person even lost his job for it. A Los Angeles Dodgers fan claims he was fired after being spotted at the team's World Series victory parade after calling in sick for work.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Bears fire offensive coordinator Shane Waldron
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Chicago Bears have fired offensive coordinator Shane Waldron. The club has promoted passing game coordinator Thomas Brown to offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: John Robinson, successful football coach at USC and with the LA Rams, has died at 89
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — John Robinson, the veteran football coach who enjoyed many years of success at the University of Southern California and with the Los Angeles Rams, has died. He was 89. The Rams confirmed Robinson's death on Monday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mitchell scores 36 as the Cavs beat the Bulls 119-113 for 12th straight win
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored a season-high 36 points, and the Cleveland Cavaliers beat the Chicago Bulls 119-113 on Monday night to become the eighth NBA team to begin a season with 12 straight wins.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Column: Coaching cannibalism of Chicago quarterbacks continues
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The dysfunction of the Chicago Bears coaching staff is plain for all to see, and it will only continue to hamper the development of the most talented and famous football player ever drafted by the franchise if left to continue as-is.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 2024 Silver Pigskin Gala Awards
item.description: The Ballots for the 2024 Silver Pigskin Gala Awards have been released today to over 200 local coaches, PPR staff, former winners, local media, and influencers to vote on the best players in the county.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Premier League ref David Coote suspended over alleged anti-Liverpool remarks
item.description: An English Premier League referee has been suspended after videos on social media appeared to show him making derogatory remarks about former Liverpool manager Jürgen Klopp.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
